contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Autopilot allowlist + mobile attest button fix
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/42
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/butterfly-effect-club/pull/1
  
  Details:
  Two related fixes shipped in parallel: (1) extended truesight_autopilot allowed_repos with the three credentialing-platform repos (capoeira, program-template, butterfly-effect-club); (2) CSS-only mobile fix on butterfly-effect-club admin console — wraps the queue tables in a horizontally-scrollable container with a sticky-right action column under 640px so the Attest / Retry / View button stays pinned to the viewport edge instead of being clipped by the section.tabbed overflow:hidden boundary. After merge, autopilot redeployed to EC2 via surgical systemctl restart (deploy.sh would have clobbered two prod-only Bugsnag .env keys, so skipped the full sync — code was already pulled before that abort point). Health check 200 OK, version 0.2.0, allowed_repos verified on disk. butterfly-effect-club Pages build completed at commit a1e4949; mobile fix live at https://butterfly-effect-club.truesight.me/
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
